summary: Dedicated Registered Nurse with nearly 2 years of experience in Medical-Surgical/Telemetry units, recognized for strong clinical judgment, multidisciplinary collaboration, and compassionate patient care. Proven ability to manage complex acute care patient loads, mentor nursing students, and implement quality improvement initiatives. Currently working as Staff Nurse at City General Hospital while completing a nurse residency program focused on evidence-based practice and leadership development.

experience.title: Staff Nurse – Medical-Surgical/Telemetry Unit
highlights: Manage 5–6 acute care patients with conditions including post-operative recovery, CHF, COPD, and diabetes
Monitor EKG rhythms for telemetry patients and escalate critical cardiac changes
Reduced unit-wide hospital-acquired pressure injury rates by 15% through peer-led initiative
Serve as Preceptor for senior nursing students
Achieved 98% patient satisfaction rating on post-discharge surveys

experience.title: Nurse Residency Program (General Medicine)
highlights: Completed 12-month rigorous residency focused on critical thinking and evidence-based practice
Presented capstone project on reducing medication errors through standardized bedside shift report
Capstone project was adopted as unit policy
